title: Working as a Freelancer Online
content: After leaving her full-time job, Emma decided to work as an online freelancer. She offered services in graphic design and quickly created profiles on several professional platforms. At first, finding clients was challenging because she had little experience and few reviews. However, she remained patient, completed small projects carefully, and built a strong portfolio. Within a few months, recommendations from satisfied clients helped her attract larger contracts. She appreciated the flexibility of choosing her own schedule and projects. Although freelancing required discipline and self-management, it gave her greater independence and allowed her to work with clients from many different countries.
